use_cases: Displaying checkout flow progress in e-commerce applications from cart to confirmation
Showing multi-step form navigation in onboarding or wizard interfaces
Indicating order processing stages for customers
Tracking application submission progress in SaaS workflows
Visualizing survey or questionnaire completion status
ai_summary: A responsive step breadcrumb component designed for multi-step processes like checkout flows. Displays progress through complete, current, and upcoming states with visual connector lines between steps. Adapts layout from horizontal row on desktop to vertical stack on mobile screens for optimal readability across devices.
